name: wolfcha
description: AI-powered Werewolf (Mafia) social deduction game where every player is controlled by top LLMs like DeepSeek, Qwen, Gemini, and more

commit.message:
fix: remove automatic payment methods from Stripe checkout session creation

Eliminated the automatic_payment_methods option in the Stripe checkout session to streamline payment processing.

feat: enable daily bonus feature in welfare configuration

Updated the DAILY_BONUS_ENABLED flag to true, allowing the daily bonus feature to be activated.

feat: enable automatic payment methods in Stripe checkout

Remove credit card only restriction by adding automatic_payment_methods
to allow Apple Pay, Google Pay, Link, and other enabled payment methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: update UserProfileModal API call and validation logic

- Changed API endpoint from "/api/chat" to "/api/validate-key"
- Removed unused 'model' parameter from the request
- Added validation for the response to check if the key is valid and handle errors accordingly
Refine built-in and custom model routing
切换默认模型：GENERATOR/SUMMARY/REVIEW 统一改用 google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview

docs: remove OpenCreator from sponsors list in all README files

- 在 README.md/README.en.md/README.zh.md 中移除 OpenCreator 赞助商条目
- 在 WelcomeScreen 组件中移除 OpenCreator 赞助卡片（桌面端和移动端）

docs: add Watcha to sponsors list in all README files

- 在 README.md/README.en.md/README.zh.md 中新增观猹赞助商条目
- 统一描述为"提供 AI 模型能力与展示平台"

feat: update Watcha sponsor positioning and model configuration

- Watcha 赞助商卡片从右上角移至右侧居中，增大 logo/文字尺寸
- 新增 .wc-sponsor-card--watcha 样式类，支持响应式布局
- 更新赞助商描述：从"用户认证与账号体系"改为"AI模型能力与展示平台"
- 切换默认模型：GENERATOR/SUMMARY/REVIEW 统一改用 gemini-3-flash-preview
- 移除 AVAILABLE_MODELS 中的 gemini-2.5-flash，注释 gemini-3-pro-preview

feat: add NewAPI integration and Watcha sponsor logo

- 新增 NewAPI 平台配置项 (NEWAPI_API_KEY/NEWAPI_BASE_URL)
- 添加观猹赞助商 SVG logo 文件
已完成newapi平台对接

fix: 修复游戏逻辑 bug 及 API 安全漏洞

游戏逻辑修复:
- game-machine: isWolfRole 替代硬编码 Werewolf 检查, 白狼王自爆加入合法阶段
- game-machine: NIGHT_START 转换表补充 NIGHT_WOLF_ACTION 路径
- useGameLogic: restartGame 加 flowController.interrupt() 防残留管线
- useGameLogic: 白狼王自爆路径猎人反应优先于胜负判定
- DaySpeechPhase: 狼刀+毒药同目标去重避免重复死亡公告

API 安全修复:
- 新增 api-auth 共用认证模块, chat/tts/vote-batch 路由加 Bearer token 认证
- 未使用自定义 key 时校验用户积分 > 0
- llm.ts 客户端自动注入 Authorization header
- credits/consume 积分扣除改用乐观锁防止并发竞态

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
feat(auth): add watcha oauth flow and update auth UI copy

优化夜间 prompt: 增加白天上下文、消除重复代码

- 夜间角色 prompt 新增白天讨论记录和自身发言，提升 AI 决策质量
- 新增 roleKnowHow 和 situationalStrategy 增强策略引导
- 提取 buildNightEnhancements/buildEnhancedSystemParts/buildContextWithDay 消除四处重复代码
- 提取 NIGHT_TRANSCRIPT_MAX_CHARS/NIGHT_SELF_SPEECH_MAX_CHARS 常量替代魔法数字
- roleKnowHow 加空值保护，与 situationalStrategy 保持一致
- 中文标签改走 i18n，新增 todayDiscussionLabel/selfSpeechLabel 翻译 key
- 移除狼人 teammateLine 重复信息（已由 buildRolePrivateInfo 覆盖）

Fixed incorrect witchHealUsed condition that caused historical targets to disappear after heal potion was used.

commit.message:
refactor: improve DAY_LAST_WORDS phase handling in game state restoration

- Extract DAY_LAST_WORDS case from combined speech phases for dedicated handling
- Add validation checks for speaker existence and death status during last words phase
- Re-trigger AI speech for last words phase on restoration instead of checking history
- Disable throttled save for DAY_LAST_WORDS phase to ensure critical state transitions are persisted immediately
- Add detailed logging for edge cases and error scenarios

- Add interview Q&A document covering core gameplay, team structure, hackathon retrospective, AI model integration, fairness controls, personalization strategies, and monetization approach

- Update referral system to grant 2 game credits for inviting new users instead of 3.
- Modify English and Chinese localization files to align with the new credit values.

修改守卫问题

1、修复顺序问题并优化 ai 提示词（修改当前发言顺序，如场上存在警长则按警长位置的下一位开始发言，警长依旧最后发言，如场上警徽已撕毁则按当场死者的下一位开始发言， 且需要保证每次发言阶段开始之前将该轮的发言顺序信息传达给 ai）
2、修复 ai 部分发言自相矛盾（女巫解药使用后仍要求"保护"），优化提示词（在 role_tips 中明确女巫技能的一次性）
3、修复 ai 部分发言自相矛盾（狼人遗言自认好人却承认自己被查杀），优化提示词（新增"lastWordsWerewolfStrategy": "【遗言策略】）
4、修复 ai 部分发言自相矛盾（昨晚平安夜，是女巫开了药还是狼自刀，现在分不清对不对），优化提示词（新增"peacefulNightNote": "平安夜说明：平安夜指昨晚无人死亡，可能原因有三种：①女巫用解药救人 ②守卫守护成功 ③狼人空刀（未选择击杀目标）。）

releases.name: v1.0.0
releases.body:
Initial release of Wolfcha - AI-powered Werewolf (Mafia) social deduction game.

## Features
- 8 game roles: Villager, Werewolf, Seer, Witch, Hunter, Guard, Idiot, WhiteWolfKing
- Multiple top AI models compete: DeepSeek V3.2, Qwen3, Kimi K2, Gemini 3 Flash, Seed 1.8
- Dual-layer AI roleplay system
- Day/Night game cycle with badge election, speeches, voting
- Bilingual support (English & Chinese)
- Voice recording and TTS support
- Game analysis and post-game reviews
- Retro design with animations

readme_html:
English | 简体中文

Wolfcha

🙏 Sponsors

Current sponsors:

  • ZenMux - Powers the core game flow, roleplay, and summary features with AI models
  • Dashscope - Provides additional AI model support
  • Watcha - Provides AI model capabilities and showcase platform

Note: This project was born at the "Watcha + ModelScope Global Hackathon" as an AI-native game.

"Wolfcha" combines Wolf (Werewolf) + Cha (猹, a character from Chinese literature). It's a nod to the hackathon host while also capturing the fun of watching AI characters interact — like spectating a show.

📖 Background

After graduating, getting 8-12 people together for a proper Werewolf game became nearly impossible. While Werewolf is fundamentally a social game, its core appeal — logical deduction, verbal sparring, and reading between the lines — remains captivating even without the social element.

To enjoy Werewolf anytime, anywhere, we built this AI-powered version. As the name suggests, every player except you (Seer, Witch, Hunter, Guard, Werewolves, etc.) is controlled by AI.

✨ Core Features

1. Dual-Layer AI Roleplay

Thanks to the growing context windows and instruction-following capabilities of large language models (LLMs), we've implemented a sophisticated dual-layer roleplay system:

  • Layer 1: The AI plays a "virtual player" with a unique personality and background.
  • Layer 2: This virtual player then takes on a Werewolf role (e.g., Seer) and speaks, bluffs, and reasons based on the game state.

Every conversation is generated in real-time, full of unpredictability and fun.

2. AI Model Arena

This isn't just Werewolf — it's a battleground for AI models.

We've integrated multiple top AI models to compete against each other. After each game, you can see which model powered each character. It's a hidden "Turing test" — observe which model reasons sharply, which one seems "adorably clueless," and which one sounds the most human.

Current built-in models (subject to project configuration):

  • DeepSeek V3.2
  • Qwen3-235B-A22B
  • Kimi K2
  • Gemini 3 Flash
  • Seed 1.8 (ByteDance)

3. Immersive Retro Experience

While we don't have a professional art team, we've crafted a polished UI/UX:

  • Retro Design Style: Clean layouts with vintage color palettes.
  • Dynamic Interactions:
    • Eye-blink transitions for day/night changes.
    • Character lip-sync animations during speech.
    • Unique character portraits for special roles during night actions.

🧭 Roadmap

We're continuing to improve:

  • Mobile Optimization: Play seamlessly on any device.
  • Flexible Player Count: Support 8-12 player custom games.
  • Post-Game Review / Chat: Reflect on strategies and memorable moments.
  • Special Abilities: Unique mechanics like time rewind and AI insight.
  • Custom Model Selection: Choose which AI models join your game.
  • Multiplayer Mode: Play with friends alongside AI characters.
  • Character Ratings: Upvote standout personalities/models to find the best Werewolf players.

🛠️ Tech Stack

Built with modern web technologies:

  • Framework: Next.js 16 (App Router)
  • Language: TypeScript
  • Styling: Tailwind CSS 4
  • UI Components: Radix UI, Lucide React
  • State Management: Jotai
  • Editor: Tiptap (For rich text interactions)
  • Animations: Framer Motion
  • Avatar Generation: DiceBear (Notionists style)
  • AI Integration: ZenMux (Unified interface for LLMs)

🚀 Local Development

To run this project locally:

  1. Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/oil-oil/wolfcha.git
cd wolfcha
  1. Install dependencies
# Using pnpm (recommended)
pnpm install

# Or using npm
npm install
  1. Configure environment variables

You'll need to set up API keys (ZenMux, etc.) for full functionality. Refer to .env.example and create your .env.local.

  1. Start the development server
pnpm dev

Open http://localhost:3000 in your browser.

📄 License

MIT
